name: Caribou Empanadas
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, melt the butter.
2. Brown the ground caribou meat in the melted butter.
3. Add onions, olives, celery, jalapeno peppers, salt, pepper, vinegar, tomato sauce, and Worcestershire sauce to the skillet with the browned meat.
4. Simmer the mixture for about 20 minutes until all flavors are well combined.
5. Remove from heat and let it cool completely before using.
6. Make your favorite pie pastry dough and cut into circles approximately the size of a cup.
7. Place the meat mixture in the center of each pastry circle.
8. Fold over the pastry, sealing the edges with a fork to ensure they are properly closed.
9. Place the empanadas on a greased cookie sheet.
10. Bake in an oven preheated to 350°F (175°C) for 20 to 25 minutes, or until golden brown and cooked through.
